positive: A vibrant, minimalist graphic design of an abstract galaxy pattern composed of celestial bodies, swirling nebulae, and geometric constellations. The style is modern, ethereal line art combined with saturated, cosmic watercolor washes. The composition features a strong central celestial core surrounded by radiating, symmetrical patterns, emphasizing deep blues, purples, magenta, and electric cyan. The overall aesthetic should be high contrast, suitable for screen printing on apparel, with clean, distinct silhouettes and crisp edges. Graphic design, vector art quality, perfect symmetry, deep saturation, cosmic elegance.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, watermark, text, words, logo, signature, copyright, dirty, noisy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad composition, messy, grayscale, photo realism
